## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing or developer-facing impact.

## Scope

- [ ] The change is tightly scoped to the intended story or issue.
- [ ] No unrelated cleanup, refactors, or backlog work were included.
- [ ] V1 architecture boundaries were preserved.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest backend/tests/`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `docker compose config`
- [ ] Not applicable, with explanation below

## Notes

Document any validation gaps, limitations, follow-up work, or risks.
